name: miro-automation
description: Automate Miro tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): boards, items, sticky notes, frames, sharing, connectors. Always search tools first for current schemas.
capabilities: List and search boards with pagination support
Create boards, sticky notes, frames, and other items
Browse and filter board items by type
Share boards with team members and manage access roles
Resolve board names to IDs automatically
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analysis flagged 68 external_commands patterns and 1 network pattern, but all are false positives. The SKILL.md file is documentation describing MCP tool usage (MIRO_GET_BOARDS2, MIRO_CREATE_BOARD, etc.), not executable shell code. The hardcoded URL is the legitimate Rube MCP server endpoint required for configuration. No actual command execution or security risks present.
valueStatement: Streamline collaborative whiteboard workflows by automating repetitive Miro tasks. Create boards, organize content, and manage team access without manual clicks.
userTitle: Automate Miro whiteboards with AI assistance
limitations: Requires Rube MCP server connection to be configured
Miro OAuth authentication must be completed before use
Board IDs must be resolved through search, not hardcoded
Rate limits apply based on Miro API token constraints

useCases.title: Team workshop setup
useCases.description: Automatically create workshop boards with pre-organized frames and sticky notes for brainstorming sessions.

useCases.title: Project documentation
useCases.description: Generate visual project boards with connected items showing dependencies and workflows.

useCases.title: Design sprint automation
useCases.description: Rapidly create and populate design sprint boards with templates for each phase.

promptTemplates.title: List available boards
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me all Miro boards I have access to, sorted by most recently modified.

promptTemplates.title: Create a new workshop board
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a new Miro board called 'Sprint Planning' with three frames labeled 'To Do', 'In Progress', and 'Done'.

promptTemplates.title: Add content to existing board
promptTemplates.prompt: Find my 'Sprint Planning' board and add sticky notes for each task in the backlog to the 'To Do' frame.

promptTemplates.title: Share board with team
promptTemplates.prompt: Share the 'Sprint Planning' board with my team members (alice@example.com, bob@example.com) as editors with a welcome message.

bestPractices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before executing workflows
Use MIRO_CREATE_ITEMS_IN_BULK for adding multiple items instead of individual calls
Implement pagination handling for large boards with many items
antiPatterns: Hardcoding board IDs instead of resolving them dynamically through search
Creating items one-by-one when bulk operations are available
Ignoring pagination cursors and missing items on large boards

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: No API key is required. You need to add the Rube MCP server endpoint (https://rube.app/mcp) to your MCP configuration and complete Miro OAuth authentication through RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS.

faq.question: How do I find a specific board?
faq.answer: Use the MIRO_GET_BOARDS2 tool with a query parameter to search by board name. The skill will return matching boards with their IDs for further operations.

faq.question: Can I create multiple items at once?
faq.answer: Yes, use MIRO_CREATE_ITEMS_IN_BULK to add multiple items in a single API call. This is more efficient than creating items individually and helps avoid rate limits.

faq.question: What item types can I create on a Miro board?
faq.answer: You can create sticky notes, frames, shapes, text, images, and cards. Each type has different required fields - check the tool schema for specific requirements.

faq.question: How do I share a board with my team?
faq.answer: Use MIRO_SHARE_BOARD with the board ID, an array of email addresses, and the desired role (viewer, commenter, or editor). You can include an optional invitation message.

faq.question: Why are some items not appearing in my board items list?
faq.answer: Large boards use pagination. Follow the cursor in each response until it is absent to retrieve all items. You can also filter by item type to narrow results.
